allow: PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Application" -MaxEvents 200 | Where-Object { $_.LevelDisplayName -in @\("Error","Critical"\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Application" -MaxEvents 200 | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -eq "Windows Error Reporting" } | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Message })

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Application" -MaxEvents 500 | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match "Application Error|\\.NET Runtime|Application Hang|Windows Error Reporting" } | Select-Object TimeCreated, ProviderName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(400,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Application" -MaxEvents 2000 | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -eq "Application Error" -or \($_.ProviderName -eq "Windows Error Reporting" -and $_.Message -notmatch "LiveKernelEvent"\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, ProviderName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-List)
PowerShell($path = "$env:APPDATA\\PowerMate\\crash.log"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { Get-Content $path } else { "File not found: $path" })

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 500 | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-14\) -and $_.Id -in @\(1000,1001,1026\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(400,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 1000 | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-14\) } | Where-Object { $_.Message -match 'PowerMate|\\.NET Runtime|Application Error' } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(500,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)
